_review_reason: Card has up to $600 annual flight credit ($100×3 Economy/Premium Economy OR $200×3 Business/First) BUT only on BA Reward Flights paying taxes/fees with the card — heavily conditional on Avios reward booking. Per OpenCard convention preferring unconditional recurring USD credits, this could go either way. Operator decision: (a) include as $600 with conditional note, (b) split into a separate 'conditional_credits' field, or (c) exclude. Travel Together Ticket after $30k spend is conditional (excluded).
_excluded: Up to $600 BA Reward Flight credit (conditional — only on BA reward bookings)
Travel Together Ticket after $30k annual spend (conditional)
10% off BA flights through Chase link (discount, ongoing)
